Trust is not something I grant easily or broadly—I have learned that the world moves in ways I do not always understand or approve of, and people change with it in ways that trouble me deeply.

The village itself has transformed. Those I knew in my younger years, the ones who understood the old ways and lived by them, have largely passed or moved away.
